summary: Amazon PDF Orders Module Testing Complete - All backend APIs and frontend UI verified working. 19 backend tests passed, all frontend features tested successfully.
seed_data_creation: 7 Amazon orders (AM-0001 to AM-0007) already exist in database with mix of easy_ship and self_ship types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Amazon PDF Orders module fully tested. Backend tests in test_amazon_module.py cover: auth/access control, orders list, order detail, packaging update, mark packed, dispatch, delete images, PDF upload validation. Frontend tests verified: Amazon Orders page with table, Upload PDF dialog with ship type/courier selection, Order detail page with customer info/shipping/items/packaging staff, Update Packaging dialog with staff selection and image upload, Amazon Packing page with Pack/Done buttons, role-based navigation (admin/packaging see Amazon nav, telecaller does not).

backend_apis.POST /api/amazon/upload-pdf: PASS - Admin only, validates ship_type, requires courier for self_ship
backend_apis.GET /api/amazon/orders: PASS - Returns all orders sorted by created_at desc, admin/packaging only
backend_apis.GET /api/amazon/orders/{id}: PASS - Returns single order with all fields
backend_apis.PUT /api/amazon/orders/{id}/packaging: PASS - Updates packaging data, changes status to packaging
backend_apis.PUT /api/amazon/orders/{id}/mark-packed: PASS - Changes status to packed, sets packed_at
backend_apis.PUT /api/amazon/orders/{id}/dispatch: PASS - Dispatches order, easy_ship needs no LR

access_control.telecaller_blocked: PASS - Returns 403 for all Amazon endpoints
access_control.admin_full_access: PASS - Can access all endpoints including PDF upload
access_control.packaging_view_process: PASS - Can view orders and update packaging, no PDF upload

am_numbering.format: PASS - All orders use AM-XXXX format
am_numbering.sequential: PASS - Orders AM-0001 to AM-0007 exist in sequence

frontend_pages.amazon_orders_page: PASS - Table with AM Order, Amazon Order ID, Customer, Amount, Shipping, Status columns
frontend_pages.upload_pdf_dialog: PASS - Ship type dropdown (Easy Ship/Self Ship), courier dropdown for Self Ship, PDF file input
frontend_pages.order_detail_page: PASS - Customer info, shipping details, items table, grand total, packaging staff
frontend_pages.update_packaging_dialog: PASS - Staff selection buttons, item/order/packed box image upload with Files/Camera options
frontend_pages.amazon_packing_page: PASS - Packing queue with Pack and Done buttons

navigation.admin_nav: PASS - Amazon Orders and Amazon Packing visible
navigation.telecaller_nav: PASS - No Amazon nav items visible, direct URL access redirects
